subject: A female warrior with long flowing hair lunging forward with a flame-accented polearm — Iroha from Final Fantasy XI
description: A humanoid female-presenting warrior charges forward with dynamic momentum, her long hair streaming behind her. She wears a white and red layered martial outfit with armored bracers and accents. Her right hand grips a long polearm or naginata tipped with red flame-detail, aimed ahead as she lunges. The background shows a sky with clouds and the silhouette of stone towers or castle architecture. A second armored figure's arm and weapon are partially visible at the far left edge, suggesting a companion or bystander. The composition emphasizes forward motion and martial energy.
foreground: Warrior lunging forward with polearm, long hair in motion
background: Overcast sky, stone castle architecture silhouetted
emotion: fierce determination, body fully committed to forward charge
